data.title: RealGo Secures Over $3.5 Million for Meme 3.0 Ecosystem Development
data.description: RealGo, an ecosystem connecting games and on-chain utilities, has announced the completion of a funding round exceeding $3.5 million. According to Foresight News, the early-stage and strategic investment rounds received backing from Animoca Brands, Cogitent Ventures, X21 Digital, Notch VC, Becker Ventures, among other institutions and strategic partners. RealGo plans to use the funds to advance the infrastructure development of the Meme 3.0 ecosystem.

data.title: Analysis: Security vulnerabilities exposed in Anthropic and OpenAI have raised concerns about the security of AI models.
data.description: Following security incidents at Anthropic and OpenAI, market concerns have arisen regarding the security of AI models themselves. Anthropic is currently investigating the possibility that its Claude Mythos model may have been accessed without authorization. Almost simultaneously, OpenAI was also exposed for accidentally releasing several unreleased models in its Codex application. Analysts believe these incidents highlight that even AI model providers that emphasize cybersecurity capabilities still face significant security challenges. As AI is increasingly used to defend against cyberattacks, platform security and access control issues have become critical risk points. Industry experts point out that these vulnerabilities have intensified scrutiny of the security governance capabilities of AI companies and reflect that, despite the rapid development of AI technology, security systems still need improvement. (The Information)

data.title: 孙宇晨回顾与USDT合作契机：曾因提取5万枚USDT遇兼容性问题
data.description: 币安广场《区块链100人》第5期 AMA 中，TRON创办人孙宇晨回顾称，自己早期在使用USDT过程中，曾在提取约 5 万枚 USDT 至个人钱包时，因当时相关技术架构与钱包兼容性问题，未能实现正常管理，由此进一步关注稳定币转账体验。他表示，此后与相关方面沟通，推动 USDT 在 TRON 网络上发行，并向多家平台推广接入，主要基于转账效率、手续费和用户体验等方面的考量。

data.title: Meteo-France Investigates Suspected Tampering in Paris Weather Data
data.description: Meteo-France has lodged a complaint regarding potential tampering with Paris weather data. According to NS3.AI, the suspicion arose after a new Polymarket account transformed a $735 wager into nearly $14,000 on April 6. Additionally, another account converted a $500 bet into over $3,000 on an April 15 Paris temperature market. Ruben Hallali from Sereno noted that the Charles de Gaulle station recorded a sudden, isolated spike during the settlement window.

data.title: Grayscale transferred 3,817 ETH and 210 BTC to Coinbase Prime, worth approximately $25.02 million.
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring data, approximately 40 minutes ago, Grayscale transferred a total of 3,817 ETH and 210.006 BTC, worth about $25.02 million, to a Coinbase Prime address.

data.title: Expert Warns of Quantum Threat to Bitcoin Security
data.description: Bitcoin analyst James Check has raised concerns about the potential impact of quantum computing on Bitcoin's security. According to NS3.AI, Check highlighted that approximately 1.7 million BTC, valued at around $145 billion at current prices, could be at risk if a sufficiently powerful quantum computer were to break Bitcoin's cryptographic signatures. He suggested that while Bitcoin's normal turnover could gradually absorb this supply over several months, the governance surrounding vulnerable Satoshi-era coins presents a more significant challenge.

data.title: Meta-1 Coin Fraud: Robert Dunlap Sentenced to 23 Years in Prison
data.description: Robert Dunlap has been sentenced to 23 years in prison following his conviction for federal mail fraud related to the Meta-1 Coin scheme. According to NS3.AI, the U.S. Justice Department revealed that Dunlap deceived nearly 1,000 investors, extracting over $20 million by falsely claiming the token was backed by $44 billion in gold and $1 billion in art. U.S. District Judge LaShonda A. Hunt has also mandated restitution for the victims.

data.title: Nasdaq 100 Index Turns Positive Amid Market Sentiment Shift
data.description: The Nasdaq 100 Index has shifted to a positive trajectory, indicating an improvement in market sentiment. According to ChainCatcher, this change reflects a warming of investor attitudes in the financial markets.

data.title: Justin Sun Transfers Significant USDS Assets to Spark
data.description: According to Foresight News, Justin Sun's address, starting with 0x939, has withdrawn 300 million USDS from Sky over the past three hours and subsequently deposited it into Spark. Currently, he has accumulated assets worth 1.3 billion dollars in Spark, with USDS farming rewards reaching 5.38 million dollars. The USDS deposits amount to 436 million dollars, accounting for 18.72% of the deposit pool, while USDC deposits total 135 million dollars, representing 28.17% of the pool.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Google Unveils TPU 8t and TPU 8i at Cloud Next 2026
data.description: Google has introduced its latest advancements in AI technology with the unveiling of TPU 8t and TPU 8i at the Cloud Next 2026 event. According to NS3.AI, the TPU 8t is designed to scale up to 121 ExaFlops per superpod, showcasing significant computational power. Meanwhile, the TPU 8i is equipped with 384 MB of on-chip SRAM and 288 GB of high-bandwidth memory, optimized for inference workloads. Sundar Pichai, Google's CEO, stated that the company is on track to invest up to $185 billion this year in AI infrastructure, highlighting Google's commitment to advancing AI capabilities.

data.title: A whale has opened long positions in ETH and BTC with 20x leverage, and the current position is worth approximately $40 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale opened a long position in ETH and BTC with 20x leverage, and currently holds 17,257 ETH and 516.42 BTC, with a position value of approximately $40 million.

data.title: U.S. April S&P Global Composite PMI Preliminary Reading at 52
data.description: The preliminary reading for the U.S. S&P Global Composite PMI in April was reported at 52, surpassing expectations of 50.5. According to Jin10, the previous value was recorded at 50.3.

data.title: Justin Sun Says He Draws on Jack Ma’s Playbook While Building Global Crypto Business
data.description: Tron founder Justin Sun said he was heavily influenced by Alibaba founder Jack Ma. Sun said his ventures, including blockchain networks and stablecoin payments, differ fundamentally from Ma’s e-commerce and fintech model, though he sees parallels in financial innovation. He added that future industry leaders are likely to emerge from new sectors such as blockchain and artificial intelligence rather than replicating existing business models.

data.title: Crypto stocks opened lower across the board, with Strategytech down 2.02%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.3%, the S&P 500 fell 0.3%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.5%. Cryptocurrency stocks generally declined, with Coinbase down 1.66%, Robinhood down 1.45%, Bit Digital down 1.91%, and Strategy down 2.02%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stock Indices Open Lower Amid Tesla's Capital Expenditure Forecast
data.description: On April 23, U.S. stock indices opened lower, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the S&P 500 both declining by 0.3%, while the Nasdaq Composite fell by 0.5%. According to Jin10, Tesla shares dropped 3.1% after the company raised its capital expenditure forecast for 2026 to over $25 billion, exceeding market expectations. Netflix shares rose 0.2% following the announcement of a $25 billion stock buyback plan. IBM experienced an 8% decline due to a slowdown in first-quarter revenue growth. Meanwhile, Microsoft shares fell 2.8%, and Adobe shares decreased by 4.7%.

data.title: STOCKS | Texas Instruments Shares Surge 12% to Record High on Strong Q2 Forecast
data.description: Texas Instruments (TXN.O) saw its shares rise by 12%, reaching a new record high. According to Jin10, the company has projected that its revenue and profit for the second quarter will exceed expectations.

data.title: Taiwan's Stock Market Surpasses UK, Driven by AI and Semiconductor Gains
data.description: Taiwan's stock market has reached a valuation of $4.14 trillion this month, surpassing the United Kingdom's $4.09 trillion market to become the seventh-largest globally. According to NS3.AI, this growth has been significantly fueled by advancements in AI and semiconductor industries, with Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) contributing to over 40% of the market's value. March exports saw a substantial increase of 65.9% year-over-year, reaching a record $91.12 billion. Additionally, foreign investors purchased $8.9 billion worth of Taiwanese shares in April.

data.title: Analysis: Over 90% of Web3 games fail because players never show up.
data.description: According to Caladan, the Web3 gaming industry burned through as much as $15 billion chasing a token-based future, but players never joined. By 2025, investment in Web3 gaming had almost completely dried up, with funding shifting to AI, real-world assets, and Layer-2 infrastructure, leading to the industry's collapse. Data shows that approximately 93% of so-called GameFi projects are now virtually dead, token values ​​have fallen by 95% from their 2022 peak, and funding for game studios has also plummeted by 93% by 2025. In 2022, 63% of venture capital funding for Web3 went into gaming, but by 2025, that percentage had fallen to single digits. This rapid shift of capital to AI, asset tokenization, and infrastructure led to the closure of over 300 games, turning Web3 gaming into a cautionary tale about chasing speculation while ignoring product-market fit. The report states that capital was destroyed simultaneously at every level, with investors, studios, retail NFT buyers, gaming guilds, and even the 300 million Telegram users' "click-to-earn" wave all becoming victims of this disaster. These failures weren't simply due to a bad cycle or poor execution. Data shows it was more of a structural mismatch: Web3 gaming models were built around financial incentives, while the player base consistently indicated they needed entertainment more. GameFi's core was the "play-to-earn" model, transforming gameplay into a financial feedback loop. Players bought tokens or NFTs, earned rewards in the same assets, and cashed out profits as new players joined. However, once the inflow of funds slowed, the economic model collapsed. Token prices plummeted, rewards decreased, users churned, and the entire in-game economy collapsed. Perhaps the most striking data point is the shift in fund flows. In 2022, the gaming sector attracted 62.5% of Web3 venture capital, but by 2025, this percentage had fallen to single digits. AI, real-world asset tokenization, and Layer-2 infrastructure attracted this lost capital. Even Animoca Brands, one of the most active investors in the Web3 space, has reduced its gaming business to about 25% of its portfolio and is beginning to shift its focus to stablecoins, real-world assets, and AI. (CoinDesk)

data.title: U.S. President Trump Asserts Control Over Strait Amid Iran's Internal Struggles
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that Iran is facing significant challenges in determining its leadership. According to Foresight News, Trump highlighted the ongoing internal conflict between the 'hardliners' and 'moderates' within Iran. He noted that the hardliners have suffered defeats on the battlefield, while the moderates, despite not being truly moderate, have gained respect. 

Trump described the situation as chaotic and emphasized that the United States has complete control over the Strait of Hormuz. He asserted that no vessels can pass through without the approval of the U.S. Navy, declaring the strait 'tightly closed' until Iran reaches an agreement.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Blockchain's Role in Addressing AI Agent Identity and Trust Challenges
data.description: Blockchain technology is emerging as a solution to address identity, payment, and trust issues associated with AI agents. According to PANews, the integration of blockchain can provide a decentralized and secure framework for managing AI agent identities, ensuring transparency and reliability in transactions. This approach could enhance the trustworthiness of AI systems by offering immutable records and facilitating seamless payments. As AI continues to evolve, blockchain's potential to fill these gaps becomes increasingly relevant, providing a robust infrastructure for future developments in AI technology.
